detail: Capture happens when order ships

detail: Full refunds available within 30 days of purchase
rationale: We allow full refunds within 30 days to build customer trust and reduce disputes
author: lnsy

detail: Partial refunds require manager approval
author: lnsy

detail: Refunds to original payment method only
rationale: Partial refunds are complex and can be abused, so we require oversight
author: lnsy

detail: More than 3 refunds in 6 months triggers account review
rationale: Multiple refund requests from the same customer often indicate fraud or abuse
author: lnsy

detail: Refunds over $500 require identity verification
author: lnsy

detail: Payment must be authorized before order enters processing
author: lnsy

detail: Orders with declined payments remain in "pending" for 24 hours
author: lnsy

detail: After 24 hours, unpaid orders are automatically cancelled
rationale: Gives customers time to update payment method without losing cart
author: lnsy

detail: Refunds appear in 5-7 business days
author: lnsy

detail: Partial refunds allowed for partial returns
author: lnsy

detail: Chargebacks trigger account review
author: lnsy

detail: More than 2 chargebacks result in payment method ban
author: lnsy
